mnemonics: IN-PLACE SWAPPER: 'Iterate Nodes, Pointers Link And Reverse, Swapping Positions Without Extra Nodes, Efficiently Reversing'
keyPoints: Use three pointers: previous, current, next to track node positions during reversal
Update node pointers to reverse links without creating new nodes
The head pointer must be updated to point to the last node of original list
commonMistakes: Losing reference to the next node during pointer manipulation, causing lost nodes
Forgetting to update the head pointer after complete reversal
Not handling empty list or single-node list edge cases properly
